metadata.source_note: Hand-traced boundary polygon for Seville Parcel 3, sized to encompass the 10 hand-traced Seville lots in adjacent-parcels.json plus the POPHAM subject polygon. Coordinates are illustrative for the demo map, not survey-grade. Plat recording metadata (book/page/dedicator/dates/parent reference) comes from authoritative sources: the plat PDF 20010093192 and the R-005 hunt log.

properties.source: Hand-traced boundary encompassing the hand-traced Seville Parcel 3 lots; plat metadata from authoritative sources.
